title: Past ability with could
subtitle: Talk about ability in the past.
overview: Talk about ability in the past.
A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: When I was a child, I could swim well.
我小时候游泳游得很好。
I could not speak English before.
No, I could not speak English before.
不会，我以前不会说英语。

items.en: When I was a child, I could swim well.
items.zh: 我小时候游泳游得很好。

items.en: I could not speak English before.
No, I could not speak English before.
items.zh: 不会，我以前不会说英语。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, I could not speak English before.
lines.zh: 不会，我以前不会说英语。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I could not speak English before.

items.en: When I was a child, I could swim well.
items.zh: 我小时候游泳游得很好。

items.en: I could not speak English before.
Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
